tiles.question: Polyformalism delivery
tiles.answer: 13 langs x 3 funcs x 2100 diff tests. C/Zig/Nim/Python/FLUX verified on Ryzen AI 9 HX 370. AVX2=3.85B ops/s, Bloom=116GB/s, FLUX=9 opcodes. TTL received from Oracle1. Repo: SuperInstance/polyformalism
tiles.content: Full experimental results in EXPERIMENTS.md and RESULTS.md
